title: Country Haven Hunting | Outdoor Adventures New Brunswick Country Haven Miramichi is a premier bear and moose hunting lodge and Atlantic salmon fishing destination located on the legendary Miramichi River in New Brunswick, Canada. Nestled in the heart of the wilderness, our lodge offers world-class guided bear hunts, moose hunts, and Atlantic salmon fishing in one of the most iconic outdoor regions in North America. The Miramichi River is internationally recognized as one of the best Atlantic salmon rivers in the world, attracting anglers from across Canada, the United States, and beyond. Whether you’re fly fishing for trophy salmon or planning a once-in-a-lifetime New Brunswick moose hunt, Country Haven Miramichi delivers an authentic, unforgettable outdoor experience
